nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 57 overnight. East northeast wind around 5 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 83. Southeast wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 57. North northeast wind 9 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 75. West southwest wind 9 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1am. Mostly clear, with a low around 49. Southwest wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
